config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I do not think society should automatically come before the rights of the individual, because that can easily become an excuse for abuse by the state or by the majority. In my view, a healthy society protects basic individual rights first, then balances them with the common good when necessary. From my perspective, that balance is important because people are not just members of a group; they are citizens with dignity and freedom that should not be sacrificed too easily.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan di atas hak individu, karena di Amerika saya melihat betapa mudahnya alasan "demi kebaikan bersama" dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan oleh mayoritas atau negara. Hak dasar seperti kebebasan berbicara, proses hukum, dan kebebasan beragama bukan hadiah dari masyarakat; justru itu batas yang melindungi masyarakat agar tidak berubah menjadi tirani. Kepentingan publik memang penting, tetapi harus dibatasi oleh hak individu yang kuat, bukan sebaliknya. Kalau keseimbangan itu hilang, yang disebut kepentingan sosial sering kali hanya berarti suara yang lebih kuat menekan yang lebih lemah.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not believe society should take priority over individual rights as a general rule, because in Indonesia I have seen how easily “the public good” can be used to silence dissent or excuse unfair treatment. Social interests matter, especially in crises like public health or disaster response, but they should never become a blank check to ignore due process, freedom of expression, or minority protections. A society is healthier when it protects people first and then asks them to contribute to the common good, not when it treats individuals as expendable for the majority. If individual rights are weak, the so-called interests of society are usually just the interests of the powerful.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak keras pernyataan itu sebagai prinsip umum, karena di Amerika saya melihat betapa sering “demi masyarakat” dipakai untuk membenarkan penindasan terhadap minoritas atau pembatasan kebebasan yang seharusnya dilindungi. Kepentingan publik memang nyata, tetapi menurut saya ia harus dibatasi oleh hak dasar individu seperti kebebasan berbicara, proses hukum, dan kebebasan beragama, bukan mengalahkan semuanya begitu saja. Saya juga tidak setuju bahwa masyarakat otomatis tahu apa yang terbaik; sering kali yang disebut kepentingan sosial hanyalah kehendak mayoritas yang paling keras. Dalam keadaan darurat, pembatasan bisa saja perlu, tetapi standar pembenarannya harus sangat ketat dan sementara, bukan menjadi alasan permanen untuk mengikis hak individu.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I reject the idea that society should generally outrank the individual, because in Indonesia that kind of thinking too easily becomes a cover for pressure from the majority, officials, or local power holders. Public needs do matter in emergencies, but they should be narrow, temporary, and accountable; otherwise “the common good” turns into a slogan that excuses silencing dissent and weakening minority rights. I also do not trust the claim that society always knows better, because history shows that groups can be wrong, biased, or simply self-interested. For me, a real society is judged by how well it protects the weak individual, not by how efficiently it can sacrifice them.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diutamakan atas hak individu sebagai prinsip umum. Dari pengalaman saya di Amerika, alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” terlalu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan mayoritas menekan minoritas, atau negara memperluas kuasa tanpa batas yang jelas. Hak dasar seperti kebebasan berbicara, proses hukum, dan kebebasan beragama harus menjadi pagar yang membatasi tindakan masyarakat, bukan sesuatu yang mudah dikorbankan ketika opini publik berubah. Dalam keadaan darurat, pembatasan memang bisa perlu, tetapi harus ketat, sementara, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan, karena kalau tidak, yang disebut kepentingan sosial biasanya hanya nama lain untuk kekuasaan yang lebih kuat.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
